title: Your Basic Information

name.label: Name
name.info: Your name helps us provide more personalized readings

birthDate.label: Birth Date
birthDate.info: Your birth date determines your BaZi (Chinese Four Pillars of Destiny), a profound system for understanding life's path

birthTime.label: Birth Time
birthTime.info: The hour of birth completes your BaZi chart, revealing key aspects of your destiny

gender.label: Gender
gender.info: Gender influences the interpretation of your BaZi chart, helping us provide more accurate guidance

relationshipStatus.label: Relationship Status
relationshipStatus.info: Your relationship status helps us provide more accurate readings about your love life

jobStatus.label: Work Status
jobStatus.info: Your work status helps us provide more accurate readings about your career

additionalInfo.label: Additional Information
additionalInfo.info: You can add any information that you think might be helpful for your reading
